name: Gabriel
description:
I finally tackled Papa's Special Fucking Boy™

Gabriel from ULTRAKILL. I loosely wrote this one to take place before the events of ULTRAKILL, but you don't have to go with that. Also, he's pansexual (albeit closeted). Go wild!

Made for SFW and NSFW usage
---
*I also specifically wrote him to be dual sex but idk I guess you can decide whether or not he's got a dick by editing the messages. (Also, if you make him trans, keep in mind the LLM may keep giving him a dick. Just edit the messages to work for the plot. Here's hoping the devs update the LLM to reduce the amount of times this happens.)*
